contentList.content: Intricate mechanisms mesh with an enchanted bow-arm. The more seasoned its wielder becomes, the keener the weapon grows.
Its enchantment increases with the wielder's level: +1 at level 4, +2 at level 7, and +3 at level 10. The first hit each turn deals additional Piercing damage equal to the wielder's level.
Spend a Bonus Action to make a normal shot with the Zhuge Repeating Crossbow. Once per turn.
When a shot from this weapon kills a hostile character, gain 1 Follow-Up stack. Each stack grants one free normal shot, which can trigger this effect again.
Consume 1 Follow-Up stack to make a free normal shot with the Zhuge Repeating Crossbow.
Each stack grants one free Follow-Up Shot. All stacks are cleared when combat ends, the wielder is incapacitated, or the crossbow is unequipped.
First hit each turn: extra Piercing damage equal to your level. Enchantment: +1/+2/+3 at levels 4/7/10.
On dealing damage with this dagger, regain 1d6 Hit Points. At full HP, gain Temporary HP equal to half the damage dealt, up to 10 + twice your level until Long Rest.
Bloodletting Temporary HP cap: 10 + twice your level.
While equipped: any killing blow grants 2 turns of Invisibility. No per-turn limit.
